jabTemplates.myth: Your bank shows you one rate.
jabTemplates.truth: I shop 20+ lenders and find the best one for your situation.
That was one lender. I have 19 more who might say yes.
jabTemplates.hook: A bank no is not a final answer.

jabTemplates.truth: As a broker, I work for you. Your rate. Your terms. Your timeline.
jabTemplates.hook: Who does your lender actually work for?

jabTemplates.truth: You can buy with 3%, 3.5%, or even 0% down depending on your situation.
jabTemplates.hook: The 20% myth is keeping buyers out of homes.

jabTemplates.truth: FHA goes to 580. Some programs go lower. Let me actually look at your file.
jabTemplates.hook: Stop guessing. Let me run your numbers.
